# erc8004-ui

> React component library for ERC-8004 AI agent identity. Self-contained, trustless components that fetch on-chain data internally. Styled with Tailwind CSS v4. Distributed shadcn-style (copy components into your project).

## Quick Start

Components only need two props: `agentRegistry` (the chain+contract identifier) and `agentId` (the ERC-721 token ID).

```tsx
<FingerprintBadge
  agentRegistry="eip155:1:0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68"
  agentId={22}
/>
```

## Setup

Install dependencies and wrap your app root:

```bash
pnpm add @tanstack/react-query
```

```tsx
// src/main.tsx (or app/layout.tsx for Next.js)
import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'

const queryClient = new QueryClient({
  defaultOptions: {
    queries: {
      staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
      gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30,
      retry: 2,
    },
  },
})

// Wrap your app:
// <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}><App /></QueryClientProvider>
```

`QueryClientProvider` is caching infrastructure (deduplication, stale-while-revalidate) — not a data provider. It holds no ERC-8004 state.

## Components

### FingerprintBadge (stable)
Deterministic SVG visual identity badge. Each agent gets a unique, unreplicable fingerprint pattern generated from its on-chain identifier.
- Props: `agentRegistry: string`, `agentId: number`, `size?: number`, `className?: string`
- Dependencies: none
- Category: identity

### AgentCard (planned)
Complete agent identity card with fingerprint, name, description, services, and reputation summary.
- Props: `agentRegistry: string`, `agentId: number`, `className?: string`
- Dependencies: FingerprintBadge, types, utils
- Category: identity

### ReputationDisplay (planned)
Aggregate reputation score and individual feedback entries with tag-aware rendering.
- Props: `agentRegistry: string`, `agentId: number`, `className?: string`
- Dependencies: types, utils
- Category: reputation

### EndpointStatus (planned)
Service endpoints with live health check status indicators.
- Props: `agentRegistry: string`, `agentId: number`, `className?: string`
- Dependencies: types, utils
- Category: status

### ActivityLog (planned)
Chronological feed of on-chain events: registration, updates, feedback, endpoint calls, deregistration.
- Props: `agentRegistry: string`, `agentId: number`, `limit?: number`, `className?: string`
- Dependencies: types, utils
- Category: activity

## MCP Server

AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) can connect to the ERC-8004 UI MCP server for direct component access.

Configure in your MCP settings:
```json
{
  "erc8004-ui": {
    "command": "node",
    "args": ["./packages/mcp-server/dist/index.js"]
  }
}
```

Available tools:
- `list_components` — catalog of all components
- `get_component` — full source code + deps + usage for a specific component
- `get_setup_guide` — framework-specific setup instructions (vite, nextjs)
- `get_types` — TypeScript type definitions
- `get_hooks` — shared hooks and fetcher functions

## Architecture

- Self-contained: every component fetches its own data from on-chain sources
- Trustless: components never accept display data as props, only identifiers
- No domain-layer providers or context wrappers
- Caching via `@tanstack/react-query` — deduplication, stale-while-revalidate, background refetch
- React 19 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind CSS v4 + SVG fingerprints

## ERC-8004 Data Model

Each agent is identified by:
- `agentRegistry`: `{namespace}:{chainId}:{identityRegistryAddress}` (e.g. `eip155:1:0x742...`)
- `agentId`: ERC-721 token ID

Data comes from The Graph subgraph (primary) and Agent0 SDK (secondary).

## Links

- ERC-8004 Spec: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004
- Agent0 SDK: https://docs.sdk.ag0.xyz/
- Agent0 TypeScript SDK: https://github.com/agent0lab/agent0-ts
